overview.short: Singamadai Ayyanar Temple is an Aiyanar temple in Nalli, at a distance of 18 km from Sattur in Virudhunagar district in Tamil Nadu (India).

topPlaces.name: Iluppaiyurani
topPlaces.description: Iluppaiyurani is a panchayat town in Thoothukudi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Kadalaiyur
topPlaces.description: Kadalaiyur is a rural village located in the Ettayapuram taluka of the Thoothukkudi district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated 10 km away from sub-district headquarter Ettayapuram and 55 km away from district headquarter Thoothukkudi.

topPlaces.name: Kovilpatti
topPlaces.description: Kovilpatti, also known locally as Hockeypatti, is an industrial town in Thoothukudi District, Tamil Nadu, India. Kovilpatti is located 65 km (40 mi) from Thoothukudi, 102 km (63 mi) from Madurai, and 565 km (351 mi) from Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Kovilpatti block
topPlaces.description: Kovilpatti block is a revenue block in the Thoothukudi district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 38 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Kovilpatti taluk
topPlaces.description: Kovilpatti taluk is a taluk of Thoothukudi district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Kovilpatti.

topPlaces.name: Pandavermangalam
topPlaces.description: Pandavarmangalam is a special grade Panchayat in Thoothukudi District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu and belongs to Kovilpatti constituency. It is the second largest panchayat in Kovilpatti Taluk and is situated near the south border of Kovilpatti, on the Kovilpatti-Pasuvanthanai Road.

topPlaces.name: SDAT Astroturf Hockey Stadium
topPlaces.description: SDAT Astroturf Hockey Stadium is situated in Kovilpatti, Thoothukudi District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. SDAT Astroturf Hockey Stadium Kovilpatti is a field hockey stadium at Kovilpatti, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Elayirampannai
topPlaces.description: Elayirampannai is a panchayat town in Virudhunagar district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The economy of the town is based on manufacturing safety matches, crackers and agriculture.

items.note: Iluppaiyurani is a panchayat town in Thoothukudi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

Kadalaiyur is a rural village located in the Ettayapuram taluka of the Thoothukkudi district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated 10 km away from sub-district headquarter Ettayapuram and 55 km away from district headquarter Thoothukkudi.

Kovilpatti, also known locally as Hockeypatti, is an industrial town in Thoothukudi District, Tamil Nadu, India. Kovilpatti is located 65 km (40 mi) from Thoothukudi, 102 km (63 mi) from Madurai, and 565 km (351 mi) from Chennai.
Kovilpatti block is a revenue block in the Thoothukudi district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 38 panchayat villages.
Kovilpatti taluk is a taluk of Thoothukudi district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Kovilpatti.

Pandavarmangalam is a special grade Panchayat in Thoothukudi District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu and belongs to Kovilpatti constituency. It is the second largest panchayat in Kovilpatti Taluk and is situated near the south border of Kovilpatti, on the Kovilpatti-Pasuvanthanai Road.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Singamadai Ayyanar Temple, Nalli?
faq.a: The best time to visit Singamadai Ayyanar Temple, Nalli is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Singamadai Ayyanar Temple, Nalli?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (71 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (80 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Singamadai Ayyanar Temple, Nalli?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Singamadai Ayyanar Temple, Nalli at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Singamadai Ayyanar Temple, Nalli?
faq.a: Stays in Singamadai Ayyanar Temple, Nalli start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Singamadai Ayyanar Temple, Nalli?
faq.a: The top attractions are Iluppaiyurani, Kadalaiyur, Kovilpatti, Kovilpatti block, Kovilpatti taluk.
